title: Clouds
description: A living sky of clouds that form, drift and dissolve. Choose a cloud type — puffy fair-weather cumulus, flat grey stratus layers, high wispy cirrus, or a towering storm — or let it slowly evolve between them. Sunlight rakes across so cloud tops glow and undersides fall into shadow, and the whole field breathes as it moves on the wind. Type, cover, wind, evolution, sun angle and sky colour are live and mappable.
